title: Heavenly Netherite
description: To be clothed in heaven's glory, one must first go through hell.
body:
Take on the role of a royal king/heavenly warrior. This resource pack retextures all netherite items, as well as the elytra; giving them a heavenly appearance.

Put on the full armor of God, so that you will be able to stand firm against the schemes of the devil.

Sugestions and feedback: yoshiq222@gmail.com

# **Credit:** 

**All textures have been modified, but my base and insperation for this resource pack came from the following sources.**

Angel Netherite by: DOOR

[https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/angel-netherite-door/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/angel-netherite-door/)

Angel Wing Elytra by: Ocea

[https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/angel-wing-elytra/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/angel-wing-elytra/)
